name: DoIP_GetGenericTimeout, DoIP_SetGenericTimeout
title: DoIP_GetGenericTimeout, DoIP_SetGenericTimeout
description: Sets or returns the generic timeout. The generic timeout specifies the maximum time of inactivity of the TCP connection before the connection is automatically closed.
return: Form 1: —Form 2: Timeout waiting for a diagnostic message positive or negative acknowledgment

description: This value can also be configured in the DoIP.INI file.
